'''Lissa Autem''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was the daughter of [[Sagoro Autem|Sagoro]] and [[Sula Autem|Sula]], and the younger sister of [[Reymet Autem|Reymet]].

==Biography==
In the year [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]], Lissa accompanied her brother and his girlfriend [[Riao Siao]] at a pit race. While her father went on a mission to solve a murder case, Lissa accompanied her mother to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] after been separated from her father.

After the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] were reformed into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Lissa started a relationship with a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Her name is also spelled "Lyssa".
